header.title: Marketing
header.description: Run the Growth Engine, track what's deployed, review RAG drafts, and read the report.

stageWhat.LEAD_SATELLITE: Pull leads from public sources into the campaign
stageWhat.REACH_BAZOOKA: Send the outbound batch, track replies (the daily send)

campaigns.deployedLabel: Deployed by Growth Engine — track & drill in
campaigns.deployedHint: Each card shows the live funnel and stage activity — expand to drill in.
campaigns.empty: No campaigns yet — open the Growth Engine tab and click AIM to launch one.
campaigns.activityEmpty: No stage activity yet — this campaign's prep stages (Lead Satellite, Ammo Forge) appear here once they run.

files.title: {name} — files
files.description: Files generated for this campaign (niche analysis, templates, …). Click a row to open it.
files.notConnected: File listing isn't connected yet (set N8N_API_URL on the API).
files.empty: No files generated for this campaign yet — the niche analysis and templates appear here once the workflows run.

report.syncTitle: Import recent runs + counts from n8n's execution history
report.clearDescription: Deletes every arsenal run (Live activity + this report). Test-data reset — this can't be undone.
report.synced: Synced from n8n — imported {count, plural, one {# run} other {# runs}} (scanned {scanned}).
report.syncNotConfigured: n8n API not configured — set N8N_API_URL / N8N_API_KEY to sync.

section.tenderAttribution: Tender attribution — what this activity is advancing

funnel.hint: Amber = awaiting n8n. Each lights up once the stage reports a metrics count via the run callback.

report.ragHint: Lights up once the RAG Agent workflow reports drafted / approved / sent counts.
report.draftOutcomesHint: Populated once RAG-draft outcomes are tracked end-to-end.
report.tenderAttributionText: No campaign → tender links yet. Once outbound leads graduate into tenders, this shows which tenders each campaign is advancing and their € value.

drafts.title: Reply drafts
drafts.description: RAG-suggested replies awaiting a human. Copy the draft into your reply, or open the prospect for the full thread.
drafts.emptyDescription: When the reply classifier drafts a suggested response, it appears here for approval.
drafts.nowTitle: The prospect's current verdict has since changed
drafts.copyError: Could not copy — your browser blocked clipboard access.

suppressions.title: Suppressions
suppressions.description: The org-wide do-not-contact list. The arsenal never emails a suppressed address. Un-suppress to allow contact again.
suppressions.emptyDescription: Addresses land here when a prospect unsubscribes, bounces, or is marked do-not-contact.
suppressions.confirmDescription: The arsenal will be allowed to contact this address again. This cannot be undone from here.

detail.notFound: This campaign does not exist or is not in your organization.
detail.targetsDescription: The segments the arsenal scrapes for this campaign's niche. Toggle, edit, or add manual targets.
detail.prospectsDescription: The cold-outreach board for this campaign. Click a row for the conversation timeline.
detail.contractsEmpty: No contracts generated for this campaign yet.

prospects.empty: No prospects yet — the Lead Satellite populates this board as it scrapes.
prospects.notFound: This prospect does not exist or is not in your organization.

thread.empty: No messages yet — the outreach ledger is empty for this prospect.

actions.deleteDescription: Removes {name} from the ERP. The Google Drive folder and its leads are not deleted — only this record and its run history link.
actions.syncFailedHint: Check that the CAMPAIGNS LIST workflow is active.

board.title: Campaigns
board.empty: You haven't aimed yet — click AIM to launch your first campaign.
board.activityEmpty: No activity yet — this campaign's prep stages (Lead Satellite, Ammo Forge) will appear here once they run.
board.globalActivityEmpty: Nothing yet — Reach Bazooka / Reply Glock / Sleeper runs show here.
board.olderActivity: +{count, plural, one {# older activity} other {# older activities}}

bazooka.title: Daily Reach Bazooka send
bazooka.extraNote: An extra daily send fired by the ERP, independent of n8n.
bazooka.warning: Reach Bazooka already sends daily at 08:00 on n8n's own schedule. Turning this on sends a second batch — leave it Off unless you've disabled n8n's schedule.
bazooka.pickTime: Pick a time (or use Turn off).

draftReview.heading: RAG draft review
draftReview.notConnected: Draft Review isn’t connected yet — set N8N_API_URL on the API so it can read the RAG Agent workflow.
draftReview.empty: No drafts awaiting review. Hit Sync from leads to scan every campaign’s leads sheet for unsure replies, or wait for the RAG Agent’s hourly run.
draftReview.noDraftId: This draft has no Gmail draft id — it can’t be sent from here.
draftReview.contextHeading: Context — why this needs a reply
draftReview.notSendableWarning: ⚠ This draft predates draft-id capture, so it can’t be sent from the ERP. Newer drafts carry a Gmail draft id and are sendable.
draftReview.sendHint: n8n sends the final text on approve · then deletes the draft
